name: Paramount Gold Nevada Corp.
description: Paramount Gold Nevada Corp. is a U.S.-based precious metals exploration and development company. The company's principal asset is the Grassy Mountain Gold Project, located in Malheur County, Oregon, which is being advanced towards production. Paramount also owns the Sleeper Gold Project in Nevada, a former high-grade producing mine with significant exploration potential. The company focuses on acquiring, exploring, and developing gold properties in the United States.
